description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Sugo-Ashi Relaxed Walking Event – May

Date and Time: May 19 (Tuesday) and May 30 (Saturday), 10:00 a.m. assembly

Location: West parking lot of Hanno City Hall

Activity: Depending on weather and number of participants, a roughly 7-kilometer walk starting from City Hall, taking about 2.5 hours. You will walk one of two routes:
(1) In-city route: passing through Benzaiten Shrine, Chikkanji Temple, Hanno River stone-hop bridge, and other local landmarks
(2) In-city and Iruma City route: passing through Shimokaji, Soyagi, Kaji, Shinko, Noda, and other areas; includes train travel from Fushiko Station

Fee: Free (please arrange your own insurance)

What to bring: Drinking water, rain gear, transit IC card, Sugo-Ashi handbook (if you have one)

Registration: Walk-up participation (please arrive at the assembly point by the start time)

Cancellation check: From 3:00 p.m. on the day before, check the Hanno Walking Club website or contact Onda at 090-2205-8073 for cancellation information.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/13340.html
summary: ℹ️ Sugo-Ashi Relaxed Walking Event – May 19 (Tuesday) and May 30 (Saturday), 2026
